title: Bayesian Uncertainty Quantification with Anchored Ensembles for Robust EV Power Consumption Prediction

methodology.key_innovation: Combination of Bayesian ensembling with LSTM architectures and probabilistic output layers

previous_benchmarking.finding: LSTMs achieved comparable accuracy to more complex architectures

methodology.application_focus: Online range management for electric vehicles

problem_context.main_issue: Driving-range uncertainty in battery electric vehicles
problem_context.importance: Essential for mission planning, eco-routing, and coordinated driving
